title: Task List Automation
excerpt: I am working on a task list board and have groups for tasks that are due this week and next week. How can I automatically move tasks into each of those groups?

posts.author: nsheetz86 (Nick Sheetz)
posts.cookedHtml: I am working on a task list board and have groups for tasks that are due this week and next week. How can I automatically move tasks into each of those groups?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @nsheetz86

There is an app called Date Controlled Groups that can do this, see https://monday.com/marketplace/111

At a defined schedule all items in your board will be reorganized according to the recipes you build, like today, yesterday, last week, next week etc.
